name: ruby-zhexdump

highly flexible hexdump implementation
This package contains a highly flexible hexdump implementation in Ruby.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use ruby-zhexdump because highly flexible hexdump implementation.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use ruby-zhexdump as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair ruby-zhexdump with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `ruby-zhexdump --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
